item.title: LSL Healthcare Inc.: LSL Healthcare Wound Closure Tray, Model/Catalog Number: 7554 Recall
item.product: LSL Healthcare Wound Closure Tray, Model/Catalog Number: 7554
item.summary: Medical procedure kits were distributed containing Webcol Large Alcohol Prep Pads which were subsequently recalled for non-sterility. Product details: LSL Healthcare Wound Closure Tray, Model/Catalog Number: 7554
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of MD, IL, MN.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
